title: quiina juruana
intro: Quiina juruana, also known as "Love in the Mist," is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Quiinaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Quiina juruana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
